snippet.title: Gerald Roman
snippet.description:
Fingerstyle acoustic guitar enthusiast based in Baltimore, MD. I teach workshops at Dragonfly Music Center and occasionally post recordings and tutorials here. Influences: Tommy Emmanuel, Andy McKee, Kaki King, Bach lute suites.

Workshop inquiries: gerald.roman@dragonflymusic.com

channel.title: Gerald Roman
channel.description: Fingerstyle acoustic guitar. Dragonfly Music Center workshop instructor. Baltimore MD.
channel.keywords: fingerstyle guitar acoustic guitar Tommy Emmanuel Andy McKee Kaki King Bach guitar transcription jazz guitar DADGAD fingerpicking Baltimore Dragonfly Music Center workshop
